_meta.unit: LPA (Total CTC incl. RSU/ESOP at grant value, annualised over 4-yr vest)
sources: levels.fyi India 2026 (Google EM ₹103–328 LPA, Flipkart EM median ₹101–111 LPA, Swiggy EM ₹86–135 LPA, Razorpay EM median ₹88 LPA)
Glassdoor India 2026 (Flipkart Director avg ₹60 LPA base / ~₹90–130 LPA total, Swiggy Director avg ₹60 LPA base)
Instahyre India 2026 (Principal at Indian unicorn ₹80–150 LPA)
Dheya Career Insights 2026 (FAANG India SDE-3/L5 ₹45–90 LPA, Staff/L6 ₹75–160 LPA)
Quora / Blind verified data points (Flipkart Director fixed compa ₹44–56 LPA base, total ₹80–130 LPA)
_meta.refresh_cadence: Review every 6 months — April and October.
notes: IC track (junior→staff) and Management track (em→director) are parallel ladders.
Ranges are approximately P25 to P90 within company type.
All figures are ANNUAL total comp — base + RSU annualised on 4-yr vest + target bonus.
FAANG Director range (₹120–220 LPA) reflects typical India Director (L7-equivalent), NOT L8/VP which is rare and can be 3–5x higher.
Glassdoor Director figures are base-only; total comp adds ~40–60% for RSU/bonus at unicorns and FAANG.
Services director/VP roles are rare and often titled 'Delivery Head' or 'Practice Head'.
May 2026 recalibration: prior version had faang director max at 400 LPA and staff max at 260 LPA — both removed as outliers that reflect US-benchmarked RSU windfalls, not typical India CTC offers.
EM/senior_em/director bands include management premium over IC equivalents at same YOE.

staff._note: 12+ YOE IC — Staff / Principal / Distinguished Engineer

em._note: Engineering Manager — typically 6–10 YOE, managing 5–10 ICs. Data: Flipkart EM median ₹101–111 LPA, Swiggy EM ₹86–135 LPA, Razorpay EM median ₹88 LPA, Google EM L5 median ₹103 LPA.

senior_em._note: Senior EM / Group EM — 10–14 YOE, multiple teams or large org. Data: Google EM L6-L7 median ₹212 LPA, Microsoft EM median ₹138 LPA.

director._note: Director of Engineering / VP Eng — 14+ YOE, org-level ownership. Data: Flipkart Director Glassdoor avg ₹60 LPA base (~₹90–130 LPA total), Swiggy Director ₹60 LPA base (~₹90–120 LPA total), Amazon Director India median ₹518 LPA is L8/VP outlier — excluded.
